demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text:
Tôi gần đây đã ở tại khách sạn này và có một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Khách sạn sạch sẽ, hiện đại và được duy trì tốt. Nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo, luôn sẵn sàng giúp đỡ với bất kỳ yêu cầu hoặc câu hỏi nào của tôi.

Phòng rộng rãi và thoải mái, với giường lớn, một khu vực ngồi đẹp và phòng tắm được trang bị tốt. Tôi cũng đánh giá cao các tiện nghi được cung cấp, chẳng hạn như máy pha cà phê, tủ lạnh mini và đồ vệ sinh cá nhân.

Cơ sở vật chất của khách sạn cũng rất ấn tượng, bao gồm bể bơi và nhà hàng tại chỗ. Tôi đã thưởng thức một bữa ăn ngon tại nhà hàng và thấy dịch vụ ở đó rất xuất sắc.

Tổng thể, tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại khách sạn này và chắc chắn sẽ giới thiệu cho những người khác đang tìm kiếm một lựa chọn chỗ ở thoải mái và thú vị.

sample_comments.title: very bad experience
sample_comments.text:
We just checked into our room and unfortunately, we cannot stay due to serious concerns. The room is not clean---the furniture is damaged, and the air conditioning unit is visibly dusty and in poor condition. In addition, we felt uncomfortable and unsafe upon arrival due to concerning activity around the entrance and lobby.

My husband has heart and lung health issues, and the current room conditions pose a risk to his health. For these reasons, we are requesting an immediate cancellation and refund, despite the prepaid reservation. The condition of the property does not meet basic standards of cleanliness and safety.

We would appreciate your prompt assistance in resolving this matter.

sample_comments.title: This Ramada hotel is a place of disaster.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is being remodeled for both the reception and rooms. The girl at the reception kept me waiting in the same temperature desk area and used swear words when she came to me. She charged me three times the security deposit, two times $50 each from my credit card, and an additional $200 in cash. She refused to send anyone to help when I encountered a Wi-Fi issue after I called the front desk and hung up. I asked for the room to be cleaned the next morning, and I met the hotel team several times during that period, but I was continually told that the room cleaning would come. A non-English speaking lady came, and we could not communicate. I just wanted her to replace the towels and empty the trash bin, nothing else. The floor was very sticky, but I accepted it. The empty small fridge's temperature was set to maximum power, and inside there was a thick icebox when I checked in. I set it to normal temperature and put my food inside, and the next morning, the icebox of the fridge melted into water, which flowed out onto the floor, nearly causing me to slip. A young male hotel staff member came in after I asked for someone to clean up the melted water, and he complained a lot, saying I intended to cause that, which really annoyed me. But later he admitted it was not my fault, it was the room cleaning's fault. Everyone I met in this hotel was so rude and unfriendly. In the evening, after 5 PM, I encountered that non-English speaking room cleaning lady again, and I had to call the front desk asking for someone who spoke English to come. A girl came with a cold expression and directly told me to get out of my room while this non-English speaking lady replaced my towels and emptied the trash bin. I said I needed to continue my work on my laptop and asked her to just do the two simple tasks; I needed to stay in the room to complete my work promptly. They repeatedly refused to replace the towels and empty my trash bin, and we had a tough conversation when the young male staff accused me of deliberately allowing fridge water to flow onto the floor, and asked me to leave immediately. I did not say anything rude or offensive, just said no in a louder voice as I felt treated like a fool for waiting all day for the poor room cleaning. Then I returned to my room, and a southern Asian-looking hotel staff member rushed in, pointing his finger at my face and shouting, "You must leave now," even stopping me from packing up. In the end, this gangster-like staff member gave me 10 minutes to pack up and leave, in a very barbaric and offensive manner. I packed up and left within 10 minutes, and I called 911 for help regarding these hotel staff's threats. I went to the front desk and waited for the police to arrive, and with the police's assistance, I got my remaining three days' payment back. The hotel kept my booking agent, Agoda, waiting for two days to confirm the agreed three days' payment back to me. The entire stay at this Ramada was a complete disaster that made me feel like I was in a savage place. This Ramada by Wyndham Fairfield is completely unlike any Ramada I have stayed at before. It's an exceptional Ramada.

Around 10AM, I went to the desk to see if there was anyway they could allow me to speak to the manager. Me and my daughter has been displaced since Thanksgiving and have been in and out of hotels. My money wasn't enough for another night, so all I asked if they could help us out with a discount or something, or if they could allow me to keep the room for a few hours till I get more money wired to me,. I was told that the manager was in a meeting and that the will notify me when he's available. I waited 2hrs, to hear "No", there is nothing they could do. It's cold, snowing and me and my daughter had nowhere else to go. I was visibly upset, and asked the girl at the front desk to call the manager (she told the manager that I said I wanted a free night, that's not what I said) . All of a sudden the manager has left the building and I never got to speak to him. I kept asking her begg her to please give me some time, esp so my daughter could finish her virtual classes. The lady eventually called the cops on us. But the irony of it all is the officer who came, felt it was unnecessary and crazy, so he was nice enough to place is in a different hotel for the night. COVID HAS ALOT OF PEOPLE'S HEARTS QUARANTINED FORREAL.

Khám phá các địa điểm nổi tiếng gần La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham Fairfield NJ

Với vị trí thuận lợi và gần các địa điểm nổi tiếng như Cricket Hill Brewery và Fairfield Dutch Reformed Church, La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham Fairfield NJ là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn tận hưởng không chỉ tiện nghi của khách sạn mà còn khám phá những điểm đến thú vị trong khu vực.

Trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham Fairfield NJ

La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham Fairfield NJ tọa lạc tại Fairfield (NJ), Hoa Kỳ, là một khách sạn đáng để bạn khám phá. Với đánh giá tổng thể 7.3/10, khách sạn này đã nhận được nhiều lời khen ngợi từ khách hàng về giá trị, tiện nghi, và sự sạch sẽ.
